top_findings.summary: The skill requests unrestricted Bash command execution (`Bash(cmd:*)`), which allows running any arbitrary system command on the host machine. While the skill's stated purpose is to provide guidance for ONNX converter operations, generating code/configurations and following best practices does not justify requiring unlimited system-level command execution. This broad permission could be exploited to perform actions far beyond the scope of model conversion and deployment guidance (e.g., accessing unrelated system files, modifying unrelated services, or exfiltrating data).
